name: stage-capo-indicator
note: P1-5 (SDD persona goalpost): a track's capo shows as a badge on the Library row (.li-capo) but was never surfaced on the Stage header, so a performer capo'd up gets no reminder while actually playing. Fixture: a saved custom song carrying capo:2 directly (repertoire.js's mergeRec/build passthrough keeps a song's own capo field when no matching track overrides it - no separate backing-track record needed). Red-first: pre-fix the Stage header has no capo indicator at all.

steps.label: seed a saved custom song with capo:2
steps.js: (function(){try{localStorage.setItem('roadcase-ukulele-gcea.custom.v1', JSON.stringify([{id:'capoSong', t:'Capo Song', a:'Me', y:2026, d:'Mine', custom:true, capo:2, seq:['C','G','Am','F'], sheet:[['Verse','[C] a [G] b [Am] c [F] d']]}]));return true}catch(e){return false}})()

steps.label: the Stage is open on the capo'd song
the Stage header shows a capo indicator (FAILS pre-fix: no capo element exists on Stage at all)
